description: Style NoteLet only transform your everyday life from grey and monotonous to fun, colourful and creatively eventful! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these yummy tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and on-trend when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product DetailsTunic top in lightweight, soft fabric with a paint-splatter print in blue with splashes of yellow and hot pink, wide round neck with keyhole opening fastened with a covered button, three quarter length raglan sleeves with smocking at shoulders and gathered to smocked cuffs, drawstring at waist with tie-up at the frontMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash coolDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironSizeLoose FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size 38
